title: poa angustifolia f. glauca
intro: Poa angustifolia f. glauca, also known as the narrow bluegrass or glaucous bluegrass, is a variety of the Poa angustifolia plant, a type of grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia f. glauca include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
